Index.title: AgentCoin Workspace
Index.error_unrecognized: Unknown command. Type 'help' for available commands.

Workspace.title: AgentCoin Onchain Runtime
Workspace.tour_step_windows_body: Use the left rail to switch between Compose, Node, Swarm, Wallet, and Community. On desktop you can drag its right edge to resize it or collapse it with one click; when expanded, each card keeps its alert count, description, and summary visible for direct comparison.
Workspace.tour_step_status_body: This single top bar now holds active window state, node health, session/task counters, theme, language, and the guide entry. Double-click the current theme or language chip to cycle it without keeping extra buttons visible.
Workspace.tour_step_alerts_body: The header keeps only three alert counters: total, critical, and watch. Hover a number to inspect that alert bucket instead of reserving permanent space for banners.
Workspace.tour_step_workspace_body: The main panel only shows the active window's core surface. You are currently looking at {window}, and you can switch windows from the rail as the task changes.
Workspace.critical_action_guard_body: This guard blocks destructive runtime changes until you confirm them explicitly.
Workspace.critical_action_guard_clear: No shell-critical alerts are active. Proceed only if you intend to interrupt local work.
Workspace.critical_action_guard_stop_body: This will stop {name} immediately and may interrupt attached ACP work.
Workspace.critical_action_guard_close_body: This will close session {sessionId} for {name} and cut off the current protocol exchange.
Workspace.critical_action_guard_clear_attachments_: This will remove {count} staged attachment(s) from the current Compose draft. Prompt text stays in place.
Workspace.critical_action_guard_disconnect_body: This will disconnect the local management channel and clear {registrations} managed runtime(s), {sessions} ACP session(s), and {catalog} catalog item(s) from the workbench until you attach again.
Workspace.window_compose_hint: Draft browser tasks, stage attachments, and launch workflows from the local queue.
Workspace.window_compose_summary_tasks: {count} task(s) currently visible in the local queue.
Workspace.window_node_hint: Probe the local node, inspect discovery state, and operate managed ACP sessions.
Workspace.window_node_summary_offline: Local node is not attached yet.
Workspace.window_node_summary_online: {registrations} managed runtime(s) and {sessions} ACP session(s) online.
Workspace.node_capabilities_summary: [{count}] capabilities exposed by the local node
Workspace.node_scope_note: Node now focuses on local attach, discovery, managed runtimes, and ACP. Use Swarm for remote peers and Wallet for settlement.
Workspace.window_swarm_hint: Split remote peer routing, relay lanes, and cross-node handoff out of the Node console.
Workspace.window_swarm_summary_pending: Remote coordination is waiting on local node auth and peer sync.
Workspace.window_swarm_summary: {peers} peer(s) and {cards} card record(s) already available for extraction.
Workspace.swarm_console_live: Remote peer routing, trust posture, and health pressure are now readable without opening the Node-side overlay panel.
Workspace.swarm_empty_title: Swarm is waiting on remote peer state
Workspace.swarm_empty_body: Attach the local node and refresh remote peer state first. This window will then separate peer graph health, trust review, and card sync pressure from the Node console.
Workspace.swarm_attention_blacklisted: Swarm attention: {count} remote peer(s) are blacklisted.
Workspace.swarm_attention_review: Swarm attention: {count} remote peer(s) require trust review.
Workspace.window_wallet_hint: Isolate payment ops, renter tokens, receipts, and reconciliation into a dedicated ledger surface.
Workspace.window_wallet_summary_pending: Payment summaries are loading inside Node until this ledger window is carved out.
Workspace.window_wallet_summary_live: {relays} active relay op(s) and {tokens} token summary item(s) ready to graduate.
Workspace.wallet_refresh_failed: Failed to refresh wallet ledger data from the local node.
Workspace.wallet_empty_title: Wallet ledger is waiting on local settlement data
Workspace.wallet_empty_body: Attach the local node and load payment summaries first. This window will then separate queue pressure, reconciliation, and renter token coverage from the Node console.
Workspace.wallet_ledger_live: Payment queue pressure, service-usage risk, and renter-token coverage are now readable without staying inside the Node window.
Workspace.wallet_attention_dead_letter: Wallet attention: {count} payment item(s) need review.
Workspace.wallet_attention_actions: Wallet attention: {count} recommended reconciliation action(s) are pending.
Workspace.wallet_empty_queue: No payment queue summary is available yet.
Workspace.wallet_empty_usage: No per-service usage drill-down is available yet.
Workspace.wallet_usage_aggregate_only: Only aggregate service-usage totals are available right now; per-service drill-down has not been returned yet.
Workspace.wallet_reconciliation_none: No reconciliation action is recommended right now.
Workspace.wallet_empty_tokens: No renter-token details are available yet.
Workspace.wallet_tokens_aggregate_only: Only aggregate renter-token counts are available right now.
Workspace.wallet_receipt_panel_hint: Issue a receipt directly or paste an existing receipt for introspection.
Workspace.wallet_receipt_admin_hint: receipt issue requires the local secure channel to be ready
Workspace.wallet_receipt_json_placeholder: Paste an agentcoin-payment-receipt JSON object here
Workspace.wallet_receipt_json_invalid: Provide a valid payment receipt JSON object.
Workspace.wallet_token_panel_hint: Issue a renter token from a receipt or paste an existing token for introspection.
Workspace.wallet_token_json_placeholder: Paste an agentcoin-renter-token JSON object here
Workspace.wallet_token_json_invalid: Provide a valid renter token JSON object.
Workspace.wallet_receipt_lookup_required: A receipt ID or receipt draft is required for this wallet action.
Workspace.wallet_receipt_status_missing: The local node did not return a payment receipt document.
Workspace.wallet_relay_raw_transactions_required: Provide a raw transaction array before queueing a payment relay.
Workspace.wallet_relay_raw_transactions_invalid: Provide a valid raw transaction JSON array.
Workspace.wallet_relay_queue_item_missing: The selected relay queue item is missing an id.
Workspace.wallet_relay_requeue_unavailable: No replay helper requeue request is available for this receipt yet.
Workspace.wallet_relay_panel_hint: Inspect queue pressure, generate replay helpers, build proof artifacts, and govern relay retries from Wallet.
Workspace.wallet_relay_queue_empty: No relay queue items are loaded for the current filter yet.
Workspace.wallet_relay_result_empty: No relay artifact is loaded yet.
Workspace.wallet_relay_helper_loaded: Replay helper loaded and Wallet relay inputs were updated.
Workspace.wallet_relay_rpc_plan_built: Onchain RPC plan was built successfully.
Workspace.wallet_relay_prepare_queue: Payment proof is ready. Paste a raw transaction bundle, then queue the relay.
Workspace.wallet_renter_token_summary_loaded: Loaded renter token summary with {count} item(s).
Workspace.window_community_hint: Review publishable local services and capabilities alongside external partner trust signals.
Workspace.window_community_summary_pending: Community is waiting on local catalog data and remote partner cards.
Workspace.window_community_summary_live: {catalog} publish item(s) and {peers} partner profile(s) are visible.
Workspace.community_console_live: Local services, capabilities, and external partner profiles are now readable without borrowing space from Node or Swarm.
Workspace.community_readonly_note: Phase one keeps publish and invite controls read-only while capability metadata stabilizes.
Workspace.community_empty_services: No local services are exposed yet.
Workspace.community_empty_capabilities: No local capabilities are exposed yet.
Workspace.community_empty_directory: No external partner profiles are visible yet.
Workspace.community_empty_title: Community is waiting on publishable network context
Workspace.community_empty_body: Attach the local node to load services and capabilities, then use Swarm to sync remote peer cards. This window will then show the publish directory and external partner trust surface.
Workspace.planned_window_title: This window is not live yet
Workspace.planned_window_body: This window class is documented already, but phase one code only ships Compose and Node first.
Workspace.planned_window_phase_note: Phase one keeps Compose and Node live first so remote coordination, settlement, and market surfaces can split cleanly afterward.
Workspace.planned_window_swarm_body: Remote peer routing, cross-node task dispatch, and session handoff will move here once local attach and discovery flows are stable in Node.
Workspace.planned_window_swarm_status: Depends on a reliable remote peer graph, health state, and ACP relay handoff surfaces.
Workspace.planned_window_swarm_next: Pull remote peer health, dispatch lanes, and handoff controls out of Node into a dedicated multi-node console.
Workspace.planned_window_wallet_body: Receipts, renter tokens, service-usage summaries, and reconciliation timelines belong in this window after the browser-side payment path is hardened.
Workspace.planned_window_wallet_status: Depends on stable 402 challenge handling, payment summaries, and receipt-to-renter-token follow-up flows.
Workspace.planned_window_wallet_next: Split ops summary, recommended actions, and settlement history out of Node into an explicit ledger view.
Workspace.planned_window_community_body: Published workflows, shared skills, external node invites, and market browsing will land here after Swarm and Wallet stop borrowing space from Compose and Node.
Workspace.planned_window_community_status: Depends on trust posture, settlement visibility, and publishable capability metadata being available in the workbench.
Workspace.planned_window_community_next: Add published capability browsing, invite flows, and shared trust signals for external partners.
Workspace.disconnect_success: Local attach disconnected. Protected runtime state has been cleared.

Workspace.local_node_shared_bearer: LOCAL NODE ALLOWS PROXY-MANAGED SECURE ACCESS

Workspace.network_timeout_error: [NETWORK TIMEOUT] The local node connection timed out. Check network stability or node health.
Workspace.network_transport_error: [NETWORK ERROR] The node connection dropped or could not establish a secure channel: {details}
Workspace.network_unreachable_state: [NETWORK ERROR] Request flow entered an unreachable state.
Workspace.security_invalid_auth_payload: [SECURITY VALIDATION] Invalid auth payload format blocked.
Workspace.auth_verify_failed: [AUTH FAILED] Identity challenge verification was rejected (status {status}): {details}
Workspace.workflow_payment_required: [PAYMENT REQUIRED] Metered workflow execution was blocked. Required payment config: {quote}
Workspace.workflow_access_denied: [ACCESS DENIED] The node rejected the current session. Check local auth identity.
Workspace.local_node_discovery_empty: This scan found no attachable local agents.
Workspace.local_runtime_error: Failed to load local runtime state. Check local node status or proxy configuration.
Workspace.local_node_auto_attach_note: After a successful probe, the workbench auto-connects through the local proxy.
Workspace.local_multimodal_hint: Embed files as task payload attachments, then send and preview them directly in ACP sessions.
Workspace.local_multimodal_kind_custom_placeholder: Only enter this when the backend expects a custom task kind.
Workspace.local_multimodal_kind_help: Leave this on auto unless you specifically need to pin a workflow or send a custom task kind.
Workspace.local_multimodal_prompt_placeholder: Enter task input or attach files
Workspace.local_multimodal_files_hint: Supports images, audio, video, text, PDF, and other binary files; files are embedded into task payload as data URLs.
Workspace.local_multimodal_attachment_limit: Up to {count} files, {sizeMb} MB max per file.
Workspace.local_multimodal_dispatch_multi_success: Parallel task copies were dispatched to {count} local agents.
Workspace.local_multimodal_dispatch_failed: Failed to create local multimodal task.
Workspace.local_multimodal_dispatch_partial_failur: Some task copies were created, but {failed}/{total} agents still failed. Check the terminal for details.
Workspace.local_multimodal_dispatch_target_failed: Failed to create a task for {name}: {details}
Workspace.local_multimodal_dispatch_required: Provide prompt text or attach at least one file before dispatch.
Workspace.local_multimodal_file_too_large: File too large: {name} ({size}). Reduce it below the limit.
Workspace.local_acp_advanced_hidden_hint: The product now handles open / initialize / task-request / apply automatically. Open advanced config only when you need manual control.
Workspace.local_acp_auto_waiting: Handed off to {name}. Waiting for a reply.
Workspace.local_acp_auto_target_missing: The task was created, but there is no local ACP agent available for automatic handoff.
Workspace.local_acp_auto_selected_target_missing: {name} cannot automatically take over this task right now. Check its state or open advanced configuration.
Workspace.local_acp_auto_manual_needed: The task was created, but the app could not determine a single ACP session automatically. Open advanced config to continue.
Workspace.local_acp_auto_timeout: The task was sent to {name}, but no reply was captured within the wait window. Open advanced config to continue.
Workspace.local_acp_room_ready: Collaborative execution is underway with {count} available agents. {name} is handling this stage.
Workspace.local_acp_boundary_protocol_pending: ACP protocol messaging is still a skeleton implementation
Workspace.local_acp_boundary_capture_hint: Only best-effort server frame capture is available right now
Workspace.local_acp_task_select_placeholder: Select a task to send into ACP
Workspace.local_acp_server_session_placeholder: Enter remote ACP server session id
Workspace.local_acp_server_session_inferred: session id inferred from captured frame
Workspace.local_acp_response_empty: No readable server response has been captured yet.
Workspace.local_acp_controls_hint: Usual flow: initialize, list sessions, load the target session, poll frames, send the task request, then apply the result.
Workspace.local_acp_session_history_empty: List server sessions first to show resumable ACP sessions here.
Workspace.local_acp_task_empty: Choose a task to show its status and result summary here.
Workspace.local_acp_apply_result_success: ACP response applied to the task.
Workspace.local_acp_task_fields_required: Select a task and provide a server session id first.
Workspace.local_acp_task_required: Select a task before applying the result.
Workspace.local_acp_task_result_pending: No applied task result is available yet.
Workspace.remote_peers_summary: Configured [{peers}] peers / [{cards}] synced cards / [{health}] health records
Workspace.remote_peers_config_hint: The browser currently reads peers already configured in the local node. To add a remote node, write it into node config first, then sync cards here.
Workspace.remote_peers_error: Failed to load remote peer state. Check local node status or proxy configuration.
Workspace.remote_peers_empty: No visible remote peers are configured in this node yet.
Workspace.add_remote_prompt:
Initializing Headscale tunnel...
Please enter remote overlay endpoint (e.g. agent-b.tailnet.internal:8080):
Workspace.ai_subsystem_select_auto_hint: By default, the app forms a collaborative team automatically
Workspace.ai_subsystem_selected_count: Agents included in the collaborative team: {count}
Workspace.ai_subsystem_multi_hint: The app will coordinate automatically and choose the best available agent for the current stage. If only Copilot is available, it handles the work directly.
Workspace.ai_subsystem_selection_invalid: The selected agents are no longer available. Please choose again.
Workspace.ai_subsystem_empty_hint: Attach the local node and register a real local agent. This panel only shows agents that are actually connected.
Workspace.workflow_prompt_placeholder: Enter your multi-modal task instructions here...
Workspace.workflow_receipt_fields_required: Provide both payer and onchain tx hash first.
Workspace.landing_overview_text:
[ LINK CAPABILITY ]
> Connect local agents, remote agents, agents from different model vendors, and agents running on different runtime architectures into one shared AgentCoin network.

[ COORDINATION MODE ]
> Your local coding agent can patch code while a remote research agent gathers evidence, validates assumptions, and extends the task context.
> A friend's agent can join the same flow as another specialized participant. They do not need to share one company, one framework, or one machine. If they can speak the protocol, they can collaborate under shared semantics, receipts, permission boundaries, and settlement rules.

[ SYSTEM FUNCTION ]
> AgentCoin is not only a chat surface. It is coordination infrastructure that reorganizes workflows, skills, and compute into something composable.
> Capabilities that used to remain trapped inside private scripts, internal processes, or team silos can be published, discovered, invoked, verified, and assembled into real delivery pipelines.

[ WHITEPAPER THESIS ]
> The deeper problem is not merely task dispatch. The deeper problem is that capability does not flow.
> Valuable machine work is still locked inside isolated platforms where models do not interoperate, nodes do not coordinate well, and real market pricing never forms.

[ MARKET RESULT ]
> Without leaking proprietary know-how or exposing private data paths, workflows, skills, and compute should be rentable, tradable, and settleable.
> For an individual, that means orchestrating agents from multiple capability sources through one network. For the broader market, it means machine work can enter open, priced, collaborative markets the way energy, bandwidth, and cloud resources already do.

Commands.services_empty: [No connected services or capabilities are available yet. Attach the local node first.]
Commands.payments_empty: [No payment summary is available yet. Attach the local node first.]
Commands.help:
Commands:
  help    - Show available commands
  ping    - Check node latency
  whoami  - Show current workspace identity
  queue   - Show detailed relay queue
  clear   - Clear terminal logs
Commands.whoami:
identity: local workspace session
capabilities: [payments, collaboration, workflow]
